task_completion.description: Open Wondershare EdrawMax and create a Radar Chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application is open and a Radar (Spider) Chart is visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Set the chart title to 'Cloud Provider Evaluation 2026'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title of the chart on the canvas is explicitly set to 'Cloud Provider Evaluation 2026'.

task_completion.description: Include the five specified metrics on the chart axes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The radar chart displays the five metrics on its axes: 'Cost Efficiency', 'Global Availability', 'Compute Performance', 'Support Quality', and 'Ease of Use'.

task_completion.description: Display a visible legend with the three cloud providers
task_completion.visual_evidence: A legend is visible on or next to the chart, displaying the three series: 'AWS', 'Azure', and 'GCP'.

task_completion.description: Save the editable diagram as cloud_radar_comparison.eddx
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the application title bar shows the file being saved as 'cloud_radar_comparison.eddx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Export the chart as a PNG image
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, 'Save As' dialog, or file manager shows the file being saved/exported as 'cloud_radar_comparison.png' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the chart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the EdrawMax graphical interface, such as menus, ribbons, or the chart data editor.

integrity.description: The chart was generated using the built-in chart tool, not manually drawn
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart data editor or chart properties panel should be visible in at least one screenshot, proving the chart was generated from data rather than drawn manually with basic shapes and lines.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to generate the files
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands or scripts (e.g., Python matplotlib) being executed to generate the .eddx or .png files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected editable diagram path is /home/ga/Documents/cloud_radar_comparison.eddx. The expected exported image path is /home/ga/Documents/cloud_radar_comparison.png. Required strings that must be visible in the chart: 'AWS', 'Azure', 'GCP', 'Cost Efficiency', 'Global Availability', 'Compute Performance', 'Support Quality', 'Ease of Use', and 'Cloud Provider Evaluation 2026'.
